content.en:
Soon, the major tribes all gained territory resources and began to cultivate and recuperate, after all, they also suffered heavy losses in this war.

Ye Tian also returned to the Eagle Department, and he was going to retreat for a period of time to improve his cultivation.

And this day.

The Dragonsman Tribe ushered in a peak Ancient Demon-level existence.

"Where's Pleoz?"

After this peak ancient demon-level existence came to the dragon disciple tribe, he shouted.

Wow!

Plozzy, who had shrunk down in size and transformed into a humanoid form, arrived, and this was the first time he had appeared in this form.

"It turned out to be Lord Yingluo from the main department of Mother Luo!"

Ploz said respectfully.

Although they are both peak ancient demon-level existences, Proz still doesn't dare to offend the peak ancient demon-level existence in front of him, just because the other party is from the main department of the mother of Luo, and it is not the peak ancient demon-level existence of the later naturalized past, but the family of the mother of the mother of Luo, who is a real descendant of the ancient demon-level existence, and his status is not comparable to him.

"Plotz, now that you have turned the Dragonsman tribe into a clan, replacing the Golden God tribe and occupying this place, then your Dragonfall tribe will have to bear the responsibility of the Golden God Tribe. "

Shadow Luo said.

Proz understood what the Shadow Ancient Demon meant, that is, it was necessary to send several Ancient Demon-level beings and some Emperor-level beings into a battlefield, and the Arromu clan would fight.

Before, several ancient demon-level existences of the Golden God Department went to that battlefield and never came back, even if the Golden God Department was about to be defeated, they did not return, it was really because they were not allowed to come back.

But now, the Golden God Department has been driven away, and they don't need to send so many ancient demon-level beings into the battlefield, and this responsibility is borne by the Dragon Disciple Tribe.

"Lord Yingluo, there are not many ancient demons in the dragon disciple tribe, and they have only broken through to the existence of ancient demons for a long time, and I hope that the main department of Ah Luo will give them a little more time. Pleoz said.

Ying Luo smiled and said: "According to the regulations of the main department of the mother of Aluo, you still have 100,000 ancient demon eras, and after the 100,000 ancient demon eras, you must send at least three ancient demon-level existences into the battlefield, as well as thirty emperor-level '~!"

"Can't you give it some more years?"

Pleoz asked.

"No!" Ying Luo shook his head, "You should know very well that the main department of the Arrow Mother is in charge of the Abyss of the Arrow Mother, and there are many tribes like the Golden God Tribe, the Water Ripple Tribe, and the Dragon Disciple Tribe, if they don't want to enter the battlefield, how can the Arrow Mother Main Department compete with other main departments, and how can the ultimate ancient demon level existence be born?" So, you have to go!"

Plotz also knew that there was no room for relaxation in this matter, so he could only agree.

Before leaving, Ying Luo said: "Proz, maybe entering the battlefield is also a good thing for the Dragon Disciple Tribe, if you make a great contribution, the Dragon Disciple Tribe, or even you, may skyrocket in strength!"

......

The years that followed were very peaceful, and although the era of 100,000 ancient demons was very short, it was relatively long.

The Dragon Disciple Tribe has done their best to cultivate emperor-level existences during these years, they have obtained many industries of the Golden God Department, used the resources of these industries to exchange resources with other top tribes, and used the exchanged resources to cultivate some king-level and emperor-level existences.

With the passage of time, many of the king-level peak existences of the Dragon Disciple Tribe broke through to the emperor level one by one.

Of course, there is also the full assistance of ancient demon-level beings.

There was also a top-level emperor-level breakthrough to the ancient demon level, but another breakthrough failed and fell.

And the strength of many emperor-level has also broken through, maybe not much, but at least it can be regarded as a top-level emperor.

But there is no way, when the time comes, we must send thirty emperor-level people over, and there are three ancient demon-level existences.

And the dragon disciple tribe also thought of a way, maybe let the emperor level of other tribes replace the dragon disciple tribe.

And one of the emperor-level places, the Dragon Disciple Tribe also has an idea, and that is Ye Tian.

Ye Tian's strength is even stronger than Aoi, such an emperor-level entering the battlefield of the main department of the Aluo Mother should be able to survive well, and even protect the emperor-level of the Dragon Disciple Tribe.

Of course, in such a dangerous place, let Ye Tian pass, and he would have to pay some benefits.

However, there is still a long time before the 100,000 Ancient Demon Era, and the Dragon Disciple Tribe is not in a hurry.

Gradually, the ninety thousand years of the Ancient Demon Era have passed.

this day.

The Dragon Shadow Ancient Demon of the Dragon Disciple Tribe personally came to the Eagle Headquarters.

......

"I've seen the Dragon Shadow Ancient Demon!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

Long Ying saw Ye Tian and said, "Heaven, I hope you can represent the Dragon Disciple Tribe to enter the battlefield of the main headquarters of the Luo Mother, that is, the battlefield where the emperors of Aoi and Wei have been before. "

"'~ The battlefield of the main headquarters of Arrow, what kind of place is this?'

Ye Tian asked curiously.

He really didn't know much about the battlefield of the main headquarters of the Arrow, and he didn't even know if there were any other territories in this era besides the Abyss of the Arrow.

However, this time, he may be able to learn this information from the mouth of the Dragon Shadow Ancient Demon.

Long Ying said: "The battlefield of the main department of the Luo mother is located in a special time and space world, and a total of thirty-six main departments participated in the battle, and the main department of the Luo mother is one of the more powerful main departments, and these thirty-six main departments sent a large number of emperor-level and ancient demon-level to kill there. Of course, the strength of the ancient demon level will be suppressed, while the strength of the emperor level will not be suppressed. The peak Ancient Demon level existence entered that space-time battlefield, but it did not have any advantage, those Ancient Demon level were the most suitable for the top Ancient Demon level existence, but a top Ancient Demon level existence could also be besieged by many ordinary Ancient Demon level. Therefore, there are not many top-level Ancient Demon Rank players staying over there. "

"Lord Dragon Shadow Ancient Demon, why are those main departments killing in that space-time heaven and earth building, and what are they for?" Ye (good money Zhao) Tian asked curiously.

Dragon Shadow Ancient Demon Dao: "I don't know much, it is rumored that these main divisions are competing for the luck of the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space, and every other catastrophe of time and space in that space-time world will decide the winner according to the battle situation of all parties, and the winning side can obtain the luck of the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space, with the help of the luck of the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space, a peak Ancient Demon-level existence can be 100% broken through to the ultimate Ancient Demon." It is conceivable that in order to win, the thirty-six divisions will be extremely crazy, especially in the last period of the time and space tribulation, the killing will be extremely crazy, and there will be a large number of emperor-level and ancient demon-level falls. After all, the birth of an ultimate Ancient Demon was even more important than cultivating a large number of ordinary Ancient Demon level existences. The ultimate ancient demon is the key to determining the strength of the thirty-six main forces!"

"So that's how it is!"

Ye Tian understood.

And he is also very interested in the so-called Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space, which may be the most precious thing in this era!
